name: chunking-trigger
_phase_2_5_note: Auto-chunking trigger. Runs every 30 minutes; calls the Railway perception_worker /chunking-tick endpoint, which invokes scripts.chunking.process_ledger.run() — populates papers, chunks + embeds new evidence_ledger rows, AND scores them via Haiku 4.5. Idempotent at the kv_state level (per-paper) and at the workflow level (queue mode below + n8n's per-workflow concurrency=1 setting; OR-1).

nodes.name: Run chunking-tick
nodes._comment: POST to perception_worker /chunking-tick. Body: limit=0 means all unchunked ledger rows; score=true runs Haiku 4.5 relevance pass on any papers with NULL relevance_score. method:POST is explicit — older n8n defaulted to GET when method was omitted, producing 404 not_found.
